chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4380 of 2014 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For hearing of main case. 18.03.2025 None present for the Petitioner. Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Petitioner seeks employment of her son in a Government department on the basis of son quota. The Supreme Court has already declared the same to be unlawful vide judgment dated 26.09.2024 in the case of General Post Office Islamabad vs. Muhammad Jalal (Civil Petition No.3390 of 2021). In view of the foregoing this petition is prima facie misconceived, hence, the same is dismissed. Judge Judge nasir
